title: fix(deps): update module github.com/crc-org/vfkit to v0.5.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate logo banner](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/crc-org/vfkit](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit) | require | minor | `v0.1.2-0.20231030102423-f3c783d34420` -> `v0.5.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>crc-org/vfkit (github.com/crc-org/vfkit)</summary>

### [`v0.5.0`](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/releases/tag/v0.5.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.1.1...v0.5.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Add rosetta support by [@​cfergeau](https://togithub.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/57](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/57)
-   Fix inverted width/height in virtio-gpu by [@​ErwanMAS](https://togithub.com/ErwanMAS) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/58](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/58)
-   Add can\* params in `GET /vm/state` in the REST API by [@​BlackHole1](https://togithub.com/BlackHole1) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/63](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/63)
-   Update to latest Code-Hex/vz release, this fixes some memory corruption crashes.
-   Documentation updates, including a quick start guide by [@​cfergeau](https://togithub.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/55](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/55),  [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/56](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/56) and  [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/66](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/66)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​ErwanMAS](https://togithub.com/ErwanMAS) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/58](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/58)
-   [@​BlackHole1](https://togithub.com/BlackHole1) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/63](https://togithub.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/63)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.1.1...v0.5.0

</details>

---
